title: Abominable Deer Man limited summons itself after opponent Lightning

card.rawText: If your opponent uses a Lightning card, play this card from your hand to your side of the field as a Limited Summon. This card is sent to the cemetery if you have no primary creature on the field.

effect.value: Play from hand to your side as a Limited Summon

plan.title: Abominable Deer Man limited summons itself after opponent Lightning
plan.summary: When the opponent uses a Lightning card, play Abominable Deer Man from hand and verify it enters your field as a Limited Summon.

notes: Player_1 plays Abominable Deer Man from hand to their side as a Limited Summon.
Player_1 has a primary creature, so Abominable Deer Man should remain on field.

steps: Player_1 responds with Abominable Deer Man from hand.
Verify Abominable Deer Man enters as a Limited Summon on player_1 side.

expectedAssertions.label: Self limited summon route emitted evidence
Abominable Deer Man is on player_1 field
Abominable Deer Man leaves player_1 hand

manualVerification: If controller has no primary creature, 061-E02 should send this card to cemetery.
riskNotes: Card is typed as Lightning Magic but behaves like a Limited Summon creature, so runtime may still need a dedicated route.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_061_abominable_deer_man-061-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
